# Security policy

This site (`alien-truth-social.github.io`) is statically generated by
the [contentforge](https://github.com/stuccosoft/contentforge)
pipeline and published here for end-user reading only. The repository
accepts no external pull requests, issues, or content modifications;
changes to the site flow through contentforge's own review process.

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you have found a security issue — in the published site, the
contentforge pipeline that generates it, or the underlying theme —
please report it privately:

- **GitHub Security Advisories**: open a [private advisory in
  contentforge](https://github.com/stuccosoft/contentforge/security/advisories/new).
- **Email**: gmeinke@gmail.com.

Please do not file public issues for security-affecting reports.

## Scope

In scope:

- The published HTML/CSS/JS served from `alien-truth-social.github.io`.
- The contentforge pipeline (crawl, process, generate, publish steps).
- The Hugo theme overrides under `sites/alien/layouts/` in contentforge.

Out of scope:

- The GitHub Pages infrastructure itself (report to GitHub directly).
- The upstream `hugo-theme-stack` theme (report to the theme repo).
- Vulnerabilities requiring the attacker to already control the
  contentforge admin account or the Pages-publishing key.

## Response

We aim to acknowledge reports within 7 days and to triage within 30
days. Coordinated disclosure is preferred; we will discuss a public
advisory timeline with the reporter when a fix lands.
